top_signals.title: Philippine, Thai Earnings Southeast Asia’s Worst Hit by Iran War
top_signals.summary: Philippine and Thai companies are bearing the brunt of earnings downgrades across Southeast Asia, as their economies rely heavily oil and gas choked off by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
